name: Snowdrop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vegetable oil, chopped unsweetened chocolate, and 2 cups of sugar in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the salt, all-purpose flour, and baking powder to the mixture. Mix until just combined.
4. Cover the dough and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Lightly dust a plate with powdered sugar.
7. Roll chilled dough balls in powdered sugar before placing them on greased baking sheets, spacing each about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Allow the cookies to cool completely on wire racks before storing.
